title: Token expiry shown as countdown not epoch ms
description: Launcher/list output shows tokenExpiresAt: 1705123456000 instead of "expires in 2h". Users have to do mental math.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 4: "Token expiry shown as countdown (expires in 2h) not epoch ms"

acceptanceCriteria: Launcher / sweech accounts list / sweech list show "expires in 2h" / "expires in 3d" / red "expired"
JSON output still includes raw expiresAt epoch for scripts
